title: olamblis elliottii
intro: Olamblis elliottii, also known as the Elliott's olamblis or tropical sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Olamblis elliottii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional herbal medicine, Olamblis elliottii is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
